title: AI Prices Soar: Fable's Fall & China's Rise? #shorts
summary: Frontier AI models face rising costs and vulnerabilities. Geopolitical competition is driving the emergence of cheaper Chinese open-source AI alternatives, which could reshape the global AI landscape.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that frontier AI models are getting more expensive and more vulnerable, while geopolitical competition is pushing the rise of cheaper Chinese open-source alternatives. The takeaway: rising costs and security weaknesses in leading models, paired with lower-priced open-source options from China, could reshape the global AI landscape and the economics of enterprise AI.
